summary: This is a lengthy podcast conversation between Justin Brennan and Josh Giordani covering personal development, mindset, life philosophy, health optimization, and their journeys in real estate. While real estate is discussed, the content focuses on lifestyle habits, conferences, mentorship, and personal philosophy rather than specific deal analysis or underwriting tactics relevant to Brian's multifamily value-add investing challenges.
title: Josh Giordani Flipping Homes | Abundance2Give
